<features>
- animal type: dog
- fur color: tan/brown with black markings on face
- fur texture: long and fluffy
</features>

<kb>
- IF [animal type = dog AND fur color = tan/brown with black markings on face] THEN [19]
- IF [animal type = cat AND fur color = cream with dark face/ears] THEN [32]
- IF [animal type = cat AND fur color = brown/white with long fur] THEN [26]
- IF [animal type = cat AND fur color = tabby/striped] THEN [20]
</kb>

<rule_check>
- The rule for class 19 fires because the image shows a dog with long, fluffy tan/brown fur and distinct black markings on its face, matching the pattern seen in the first example.
</rule_check>

<response>19</response>
